summary: Completed frontend-only validation of the new admin Operations Screen on public URL, including nav separation, operational-only content, grouped weekly dog data, and 30-second auto-refresh behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/App.js remains very large (~1900 lines). Split admin views (dashboard, operations screen, weekly operations) into dedicated modules to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created during this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL public endpoint. Operations Screen nav exists (admin-nav-operations-screen), is distinct from Dashboard and Weekly Operations, shows five operational summary cards only, renders grouped weekly dog cards with required status fields, and auto-refresh last-updated timestamp changes after ~30 seconds. Dashboard still shows finance metrics; Operations Screen does not show financial metric cards.
rca of the issue: No blocking defects reproduced for requested scope. A transient loading state card appears during data refresh timing windows, but requested Operations Screen functionality and separation criteria passed.
